title: Wicked Irish Cod Skillet
description: Charred, silky cod served in a quick one-pan Irish skillet, dairy‑free and bursting with bright lemon and capers.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium‑high and add 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
Season both sides of the cod with smoked paprika, sea salt, and black pepper.
Sear the fillets for 3 minutes until a dark crust forms on the bottom side.
Flip the fillets, cook another 2 minutes, then add minced garlic, capers, and a splash of vegetable stock.
Reduce heat to medium, cover, and simmer 3 minutes until the cod reaches 145°F and flakes easily.
Remove the cod, squeeze lemon juice over it, and drizzle maple syrup for a glossy finish.
Return the skillet to the stove, reduce the liquid into a silky sauce for 2 minutes.
Sprinkle chopped parsley, stir briefly, and serve immediately.
